schema_note: Reference safe/risky action classes for SOC remediation. Guidance for the Remediation agent; the risky[] class is what policy.json forces to the approval gate. Not executed directly — the pipeline simulates execution per ARCHITECTURE.
safe: Isolate the affected asset from egress / quarantine on the network
Block the attacker source IP at the WAF/firewall
Force a vulnerability rescan to clear a stale finding
Raise monitoring sensitivity on the affected asset
risky: Roll the service to a patched build
Rebuild the host from a known-good image
Rotate credentials/certificates reachable from the compromised asset
Force a credential reset for affected users
